compiled_state.title: Add INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED brainstorm handling and observability to sprint SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Add non-interactive mode INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED handling for brainstorm escalation and ensure all REPLAN_TRIGGER/REPLAN_RESOLVED comments follow the contract format.

## TDD Requirement
Eval RED test from task c4a2-ccf0 must be written first. This task makes that eval pass (GREEN).

## Implementation
Modify plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md:

### Non-Interactive Brainstorm Escalation
In the Phase 2 d-replan-collect section (and any other location where brainstorm escalation requires user confirmation):
1. Check if the session is non-interactive (interactivity mode declared at session start)
2. If non-interactive and brainstorm escalation needed:
   a. Record: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment <epic-id> "INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: brainstorm — <reason>. Re-run sprint interactively to address."
   b. Skip the brainstorm cascade and continue with remaining work
   c. Do NOT block waiting for user input
3. If interactive: proceed with existing user confirmation flow

### Observability Format Enforcement
Verify that all REPLAN_TRIGGER and REPLAN_RESOLVED comments across the SKILL.md follow the contract format from plugins/dso/docs/contracts/replan-observability.md:
- REPLAN_TRIGGER: <type> — <description> (types: drift, failure, validation, review)
- REPLAN_RESOLVED: <tier> — <description> (tiers: implementation-plan, brainstorm)

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED handling for brainstorm escalation
  Verify: grep -q 'INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED.*brainstorm' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references the replan-observability contract
  Verify: grep -q 'replan-observability' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] Sprint eval INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
